name: Aunt Cora's Sourdough Biscuits
recipeInstructions: More baking soda may be added if the starter is very sour. In a bowl, combine the flour and sourdough starter in a well. Add the melted shortening and dry ingredients. Mix lightly until the dough has the consistency of bread or a satin finish. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and knead until smooth. Roll to 1/2 inch thickness, cut into biscuits, and place on a greased pan. Brush all sides with melted butter. Let rise over boiling water for 30 minutes. Bake at 425°F for 15-20 minutes.
